nasb.text: Then he called for Moses and Aaron at night and said, “Rise up, get out from among my people, both you and the sons of Israel; and go, worship the Lord, as you have said.

esv.text: Then he summoned Moses and Aaron by night and said, “Up, go out from among my people, both you and the people of Israel; and go, serve the Lord, as you have said.

cnv.text: 夜裡，法老把摩西和亞倫召了來，說：“你們和以色列人都起來，離開我的人民出去，照著你們所說的，去事奉耶和華吧；

ccb.text: 法老连夜召见摩西和亚伦，对他们说：“你们和以色列人走吧，离开我的人民。就照你们的要求，去事奉耶和华吧！
